contact.address: No. 88 Tea Industry Road, Hangzhou, China

products.title: RTD Tea Bases
products.summary: Ready-to-use tea bases for bottled tea and beverage production.
products.summaryZh: 适用于瓶装茶和饮料生产的即用型茶基底。
products.detail: Stable tea base formats for scalable beverage manufacturing, including black tea, green tea, oolong tea and custom blends.
products.detailZh: 面向规模化饮料生产的稳定茶基底，覆盖红茶、绿茶、乌龙茶和定制拼配方案。

products.title: Tea Extracts & Powders
products.summary: Concentrated tea extracts and powders for formula development.
products.summaryZh: 用于配方开发的浓缩茶萃取液与粉末。
products.detail: Concentrated liquid and powder ingredients designed for flavor consistency, process compatibility and convenient logistics.
products.detailZh: 浓缩液体与粉末原料，兼顾风味稳定、工艺兼容和物流便利。

products.title: Tea Ingredients
products.summary: Loose tea, blends and supporting ingredients for commercial tea menus.
products.summaryZh: 适用于商业茶饮菜单的原叶茶、拼配茶和配套原料。
products.detail: Selected tea leaves and blends for F&B chains, drink brands and OEM production programs.
products.detailZh: 为餐饮连锁、饮品品牌和 OEM 生产项目提供精选茶叶与拼配方案。

products.title: OEM/ODM Service
products.summary: Custom product development from formula to production handoff.
products.summaryZh: 从配方开发到量产交付的定制服务。
products.detail: Formula design, sampling, pilot review, packaging coordination and production support for private-label tea beverage projects.
products.detailZh: 为自有品牌茶饮项目提供配方设计、打样、小试评估、包装协同和生产支持。
